text:
Hi Prasanth

Please read the handbook, it breaks it down step by step..

I think the section you will be interested in will be found at;
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/x11.html

I am will help you if you get stuck anywhere, just send me an email.


--
Kind Regards

Craig Butler
craig001@lerwick.hopto.org
